name: Jon Batiste
abstract: Jonathan Michael Batiste (born November 11, 1986) is an American musician, songwriter, record producer, bandleader, television personality and actor. He has recorded and performed with artists including Alicia Keys, Stevie Wonder, Prince, Willie Nelson, Doja Cat, Lenny Kravitz, ASAP Rocky, Ed Sheeran, Lana Del Rey, Roy Hargrove, Juvenile…

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Barron
about_quotes.evidence: One of them is – I don’t know if you know Jonathan Batiste, who’s from New Orleans, who’s an incredible young pianist. He’s the graduate.
